description_long: This is a stylized humanoid fairy figure with delicate, translucent wings extending from its upper back. The figure has pointed ears, short hair, and is dressed in a fitted bodysuit with armored shoulder pads and boots. The arms are outstretched horizontally, and the legs are straight, giving a T-pose stance. The wings are semi-transparent and have a soft, ethereal glow, adding a fantastical element to the character. The overall build is athletic and slender, with defined musculature and a confident posture. The attire and accessories suggest a blend of fantasy and light armor, suitable for a magical urban or park setting.
description: A stylized humanoid fairy with translucent wings, pointed ears, and a fitted bodysuit with armor-like details, standing in a T-pose. The figure has short hair and an athletic build, exuding a magical and confident presence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the fairy's face, pointed ears, short hair, outstretched arms, and the front of the bodysuit with shoulder armor.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the thickness and layering of the wings, and the fitted nature of the bodysuit.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full span and attachment of the translucent wings, the back of the bodysuit, and the back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, wing structure, and the side of the armor and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted bodysuit with armored shoulder pads and boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms outstretched in a T-pose
